name: JosiDog Regular 15kg
shortDescription: The finely tuned, gluten-free formula of JosiDog Regular is suitable for dogs with slightly elevated energy requirements. Complete feed for adult dogs.
description: Composition: Regular - Complete feed for adult dogs. Composition: whole grain corn; dried poultry protein; poultry fat; beet fibre; meat-and-bone meal; hydrolysed animal protein; minerals; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); dried meat from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus). Product Details: The finely tuned, gluten-free formula of JosiDog Regular is suitable for dogs with slightly elevated energy requirements. Complete feed for adult dogs. Complete & Balanced Nutrition Formulated to: . Maintain optimal energy levels . Support joint health and mobility . Promote strong immunity and vitality . Be gentle on sensitive digestive systems Nutrient Value Protein ~24% Fat ~12% Crude Fiber ~2.5% Crude Ash ~7% Moisture ~10 Why Choose JosiDog Regular? Supports Energy Needs – ideal for adult dogs with moderate activity levels or slightly elevated energy requirements. Gluten-Free Formula – gentle on digestion and suitable for sensitive stomachs. Strong Joints & Mobility – enriched with New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus) for joint support. Digestive Health – contains chicory root as a natural source of inulin to promote healthy gut flora. Healthy Bones & Teeth – balanced minerals contribute to robust bone and dental health.
